summary: Iteration 6 testing complete. Verified new loan tracking features (advance increases loan_balance, loan_repayment decreases it), Leave CRUD operations, and enhanced employee summary with 3 tabs (Salary & Payments, Loan/Advance, Leave Records). All 11 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI verification confirms: Pay dialog with 6 payment types including hint text, Leave dialog with type/days/dates/reason fields, and View Summary with 3 tabs showing loan totals and leave balances.

issues: Console warning: HTML hydration error about <tr> inside <span> - React DevTools artifact, not functional issue (same as previous iterations)

passed_tests: Backend: Login with test@example.com/password123 returns access_token
Backend: POST /api/salary-payments with payment_type=advance increases employee loan_balance
Backend: POST /api/salary-payments with payment_type=loan_repayment decreases employee loan_balance
Backend: GET /api/employees/{id}/summary returns loan (total_advance, total_repaid, balance)
Backend: GET /api/employees/{id}/summary returns leave (annual_used, annual_remaining, sick_used, sick_remaining, unpaid_used)
Backend: GET /api/employees/{id}/summary returns monthly_summary with loan_repayment field
Backend: POST /api/leaves creates leave record
Backend: GET /api/leaves returns leave list
Backend: GET /api/leaves?employee_id=X filters by employee
Backend: DELETE /api/leaves/{id} works
Backend: Employee has loan_balance field
Frontend: Employee table shows Loan Balance column - VERIFIED
Frontend: Pay dialog shows 6 payment types including Advance/Loan and Loan Repayment - VERIFIED
Frontend: Pay dialog shows hint 'Will increase loan balance' for advance - VERIFIED
Frontend: Pay dialog shows hint 'Will decrease loan balance' for loan_repayment - VERIFIED
Frontend: Leave button on each employee row opens Leave dialog - VERIFIED
Frontend: Leave dialog has type (Annual/Sick/Unpaid/Other), days, start/end date, reason - VERIFIED
Frontend: View Summary has 3 tabs: Salary & Payments, Loan/Advance, Leave Records - VERIFIED
Frontend: Loan tab shows total_advance ($2000), total_repaid ($500), outstanding balance ($1500) - VERIFIED
Frontend: Leave tab shows annual used/remaining (5/30, 25 remaining), sick (0/15, 15 remaining), unpaid (0 days) - VERIFIED
Frontend: Stats cards show Outstanding Loans total ($1500.00) - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: Loan tracking correctly implemented: advance increases loan_balance, loan_repayment decreases it
Leave model with CRUD operations working correctly with employee filtering
Employee summary endpoint returns comprehensive loan and leave data
Frontend Pay dialog properly shows 6 payment types with contextual hints
Leave dialog has all required fields (type, days, dates, reason)
Summary dialog 3-tab UI excellent: Salary & Payments shows monthly breakdown, Loan tab shows totals, Leave tab shows used/remaining
seed_data_creation: Test data: Ahmed Khan - loan_balance=$1500 (advance $2000, repaid $500), 5 days annual leave taken. Total paid: $11300.00 across Feb 2026 period.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 complete. New features tested: 1) Employee model has loan_balance field, 2) payment_type='advance' increases employee.loan_balance, payment_type='loan_repayment' decreases it, 3) Leave model with CRUD: POST /api/leaves, GET /api/leaves, GET /api/leaves?employee_id=X, DELETE /api/leaves/{id}, 4) GET /api/employees/{id}/summary enhanced with 'loan' object (total_advance, total_repaid, balance) and 'leave' object (annual_used, annual_remaining, sick_used, sick_remaining, unpaid_used), 5) Frontend Pay dialog has 6 payment types with hints ('Will increase/decrease loan balance'), 6) Leave dialog has type/days/dates/reason fields, 7) View Summary has 3 tabs showing salary payments, loan tracking, and leave balances. Ahmed Khan test data: $1500 loan balance, 5 days annual leave used.
